snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ūüĎÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: TRUCO | PATINETE HIBRIDO CASERO (200Km/L) Motor de Gasolina y Motor Electrico a la vez
snippet.description:
El primer Patinete Hibrido. Puede ser este el vehiculo mas eficiente del mundo? 
Funciona con electricidad, con gasolina... y con el pie :D

‚Ėļ Enlaces: 

- Cinchas: https://amzn.to/3sEEz9S
- Bateria Portatil: http://bit.ly/bateriapatin 
- Generador de 9kg y 58db: http://bit.ly/generador9kg
- Patinete Electrico:  http://crowdfunding.kilkermobility.com/ 
- Bici electrica: http://bit.ly/z16bici 
- Logo LED personalizado: https://s.click.aliexpress.com/e/_9zj6xE 
- 500 Bridas: https://amzn.to/3sw2VT3

Se podria hacer en una bicicleta electrica, o en resumen en cualquier vehiculo electrico de este tipo.
Hacer cientos de kilometros en bici es mucho mas facil si "nunca" se acaba la bateria.
Comprobar la normativa de tu pais antes de usar algo similar en la via publica.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚ÄĚ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

snippet.title: Starship | SN11 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, March 30, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 11 (SN11) ‚Äď our fourth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN11 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN11 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN11‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs fourth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: ¬ŅEst√° el mundo preparado para los megabarcos como el Ever Given?
snippet.description:
En los √ļltimos veinte a√Īos el tama√Īo de los cargueros se ha cuadruplicado. Los megabarcos est√°n revolucionando el comercio mar√≠timo. Permiten crear una econom√≠a de escala, reducir costes y transportar muchas m√°s toneladas. Pero tambi√©n presentan una serie de desaf√≠os sin precedentes para las infraestructuras mar√≠timas y el medio ambiente. Un solo accidente puede tener consecuencias globales, como se ha visto en el caso del Evergiven. Y eso que el carguero que ha bloqueado el Canal de Suez, en la lista mundial de megabuques, solo ocupa la d√©cima posici√≥n.

En 1996, el portacontenedores m√°s grande del mundo - el Regina Maersk - ten√≠a una capacidad de carga de 7.000 contenedores. Diez a√Īos despu√©s se alcanzaban los 12.000 T.E.U. El T.E.U. (Twenty-foot eqiuvalent unit, o Unidad Equivalente a Veinte Pies) es la unidad que mide la cantidad de contenedores que puede transportar un carguero. A partir de 2015 los barcos con m√°s de 12.000 T.E.U. han empezado a dominar el mar, desplazando los cargueros m√°s peque√Īos hacia rutas secundarias. En 2020, con el mundo en plena pandemia, un monstruo marino de m√°s de 24.000 T.E.U. llamado HMM Algeciras empezaba a surcar las aguas.

La OCDE considera que este modelo podr√≠a ser inviable en los pr√≥ximos a√Īos. Pero los grandes armadores como MSC, COSCO, Evergreen y Maersk no est√°n de acuerdo y otros 60 megabarcos est√°n en construcci√≥n y estar√°n operativos en los pr√≥ximos a√Īos. Seg√ļn un informe de Mc Kinsey, en 2050 veremos cargueros capaces de llevar hasta 50.000 contenedores. O sea m√°s de dos veces el Evergiven.

snippet.title: Lil Nas X "Montero (Call Me By Your Name)" Official Lyrics & Meaning | Verified
snippet.description:
Lil Nas X‚Äôs ‚ÄúMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)‚ÄĚ is his latest hit, with the music video racking up over 32 million views since it dropped on Friday. Produced by Roy Lenzo, Omer Fedi, and Take a Daytrip, the song first popped up as an Instagram snippet and later appeared in a Logitech Super Bowl commercial. It is the second single from his upcoming album of the same name, which is expected to drop this summer.

‚ÄúMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)‚ÄĚ is inspired by a former relationship, with lyrics that reflect the artist‚Äôs journey to accepting his sexuality.

snippet.title: Star Wars: The Bad Batch | Official Trailer | Disney+
snippet.description:
Check out the brand-new trailer for Lucasfilm‚Äôs ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch,‚ÄĚ an original animated series launching exclusively on Disney+. ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ makes its debut on Tuesday, May 4, with a special 70-minute premiere, followed by new episodes every Friday starting on May 7. 

 

‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ follows the elite and experimental clones of the Bad Batch (first introduced in ‚ÄúThe Clone Wars‚ÄĚ) as they find their way in a rapidly changing galaxy in the immediate aftermath of the Clone War. Members of Bad Batch‚ÄĒa unique squad of clones who vary genetically from their brothers in the Clone Army‚ÄĒeach possess a singular exceptional skill that makes them extraordinarily effective soldiers and a formidable crew.

 

‚ÄúStar Wars: The Bad Batch‚ÄĚ is executive produced by Dave Filoni (‚ÄúThe Mandalorian,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars: The Clone Wars‚ÄĚ), Athena Portillo (‚ÄúStar Wars: The Clone Wars,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels‚ÄĚ), Brad Rau (‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance‚ÄĚ) and Jennifer Corbett (‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúNCIS‚ÄĚ) with Carrie Beck (‚ÄúThe Mandalorian,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Rebels‚ÄĚ) as co-executive producer and Josh Rimes as producer (‚ÄúStar Wars Resistance‚ÄĚ). Rau is also serving as supervising director with Corbett as head writer.    

 

Visit StarWars.com for more exciting news on the series.

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN11 test flight from a foggy Boca Chica, Texas
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN11 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible in the morning local time on Tuesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: CANAL DE SUEZ:  230 buques BLOQUEADOS  y 8.000 MILLONES de EUROS de P√ČRDIDAS diarias | RTVE
snippet.description:
El Canal de Suez es una de las principales arterias comerciales del planeta y conecta el mar Mediterr√°neo y el mar Rojo. Su bloqueo, despu√©s de que este martes encallase un carguero, ha hecho que el transporte de mercanc√≠as sufra un gran retraso, y al mismo tiempo ha causado la subida del precio del petr√≥leo.

El buque portacontenedores paname√Īo Ever Given, operado por una compa√Ī√≠a de transportes de Taiw√°n, --de 400 metros de eslora, 59 de manga y una capacidad de 224.000 toneladas-- se ha quedado cruzado en el Canal de Suez mientras lo atravesaba desde el sur camino a Rotterdam debido a las malas condiciones meteorol√≥gicas por una tormenta de polvo.

snippet.title: Introducing Stretch
snippet.description:
Meet Stretch, a prototype of our new robot designed to automate box moving tasks in warehouses and distribution centers. Stretch‚Äôs mobile base allows it to go to where repetitive box lifting is required - unloading trucks, building pallets of boxes and order building. Stretch makes warehouse operations more efficient and safer for workers.

Stretch‚Äôs technology builds upon our decades of advancements in robotics to create a flexible, easily integrated solution that can be deployed in any warehouse. Learn more at https://www.bostondynamics.com/stretch.

snippet.title: Emanet 147. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 147 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: TREMENDA BRONCA de CRISTIANO, le ANULAN  GOL LEGITIMO con PORTUGAL y CR7 se MARCHA ENOJADO
snippet.description:
Descarga OneFootball Gratis Aqui: : 
https://tinyurl.com/y4jafbpg
Cristiano Ronaldo estall√≥ en el tiempo a√Īadido del partido disputado en Belgrado contra Serbia (2-2), despu√©s de que le fuera anulado un gol aparentemente legal, en la √ļltima acci√≥n del partido el 27 de marzo del 2021.  Un pase desde la izquierda de Nuno Mendes fue aprovechado por el atacante del Juventus que alcanz√≥ a golpear el bal√≥n antes de que llegara el meta del Eibar Marko Dimitrovic. La pelota sobrepas√≥ claramente la l√≠nea de gol. El defensa Stefan Mitrovic la sac√≥ cuando ya hab√≠a entrado. Cristiano empez√≥ a celebrar el tanto. Pero el juez asistente no indic√≥ gol y el √°rbitro tampoco. El jugador del Juventus protest√≥ airadamente al l√≠nea y despu√©s vio la tarjeta amarilla. En la fase de clasificaci√≥n para el Mundial de Catar 2022 no hay videoarbitraje, por lo que la acci√≥n no pudo ser revisada. El √°rbitro neerland√©s Makkelie pit√≥ el final. Ronaldo tir√≥ el brazalete de su selecci√≥n al suelo y se march√≥ al vestuario indignado. El choque termin√≥ con empate a dos goles.

Cada d√≠a que pasa se pierden miles de millones de d√≥lares. Las consecuencias que tienen las mercanc√≠as colapsadas: un aumento de precios para los consumidores. snippet.title: CANAL DE SUEZ: Reflotan parcialmente el buque EVER GIVEN  | RTVE
snippet.description:
El buque Ever Given ha sido "reflotado parcialmente" tras seis d√≠as varado en el canal de Suez, lo que provoc√≥ la suspensi√≥n de uno de los pasos mar√≠timos m√°s importantes del mundo, aunque no est√° claro cu√°ndo reabrir√°, seg√ļn han informado distintas empresas que ofrecen servicios log√≠sticos en canales y estrechos.

"Ever Given ha sido reflotado parcialmente en el Canal de Suez", ha indicado la firma Leth Agencies al publicar una foto sat√©lite del gigante portacontenedores que mostraba que se hab√≠a movido la popa de la embarcaci√≥n, una informaci√≥n tambi√©n publicada por la firma Inchcape, que ha a√Īadido que el barco "est√° siendo asegurado", seg√ļn ha informado la compa√Ī√≠a y poco despu√©s lo ha confirmado el Canal de Suez.
